subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily, this servant, destitute and poor, captive of Thy bestowals, a thrall of Thy grace, taking refuge at Thy threshold, hath no companion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک البائس الفقیر اسیر الطافک اجیر احسانک المستجیر ببابک لیس له سمیر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
